intent: CRM must be fully spec-driven — no bespoke component, no hand-written page/service. The page and the whole action layer (including the convert CHAIN-001) must be generated from specs so future changes are spec edits, not code edits.
changes: Authored the CRM screen spec (columns, create fields, stage row-select, convert/lost/assign custom actions, comms detail panel, import) and the CRM actions spec (list, create+server-fill+dedupe, setStage/assignLead/markLost, convert chain with capture+ensure-queue, interactions sub-collection). Built gen_screens.py, gen_actions.py, gen_effects.py.
